title: Aleuritia microloma
taxonomy: Aleuritia microloma belongs to the family Apocynaceae. This plant is a species of flowering plant in the genus Aleuritia. Aleuritia microloma is native to Ecuador, and its classification also includes being a species of succulent plant. The classification of Aleuritia microloma is further categorized under the subfamily Rauvolfioideae. More research is needed for a comprehensive classification understanding of this plant.
